name: "Miniature Stonecraft"
description: A Seelie statue concealed within stone, said to have been modeled after a certain renowned writer.\nTo reveal the statue hidden within, the extra stone must first be chipped away, and only then does the shape of a Seelie slowly emerge. To make it truly lifelike, however, would take certain secret techniques of a great mage...\nOf course, no such witchcraft exists within the Serenitea Pot. Even so, Tubby has found a special way to recreate the process of shaping and refining a Seelie statue.
